qa_pairs.question: What are the specifications of the H100-3g.40gb GPU instance profile?
qa_pairs.answer: The H100-3g.40gb GPU instance profile provides 3/8th of the computing power with 40GB of GPU memory.

qa_pairs.question: How do less powerful Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles affect resource allocation and job priority?
qa_pairs.answer: Using less powerful Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles will have a lower impact on your allocated priority and resource consumption.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user list all the available Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles and full GPU names on a specific cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To list all available Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles and full GPU names on a given cluster, a user can run the command: `sinfo -o "%G"|grep gpu|sed 's/gpu://g'|sed 's/),/\n/g'|cut -d: -f1|sort|uniq`.
